findings.description: Cross-market incoherence (actual O/U-2.5 market price minus the 1x2 market's rho-corrected implied O/U probability) as a predictive signal for the 1x2 market. Reclassified not_confirmed 2026-07-06: independent replication on the newly imported 2025/26 season failed to reproduce the effect (negative incremental gain at default C, sign unstable across the C-grid).
